channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Apple Unveils Enhanced Siri AI Assistant
item.description: Apple has launched a new Siri AI, offering improved personal assistance with enhanced context and awareness. This upgrade aims to redefine user interaction with Apple devices.

item.title: Crazy Taxi Producer Addresses AI Controversy
item.description: The producer of Crazy Taxi: World Tour clarifies the game's AI usage amid fan concerns. The announcement has sparked discussions about AI's role in gaming.

item.title: Instagram Now Allows Profile Grid Reorganization
item.description: Instagram has rolled out a feature enabling users to rearrange their profile grid freely. This update enhances user customization options.

item.title: Xbox Leaks Gears of War PS5 Trailer
item.description: An accidental upload revealed a Gears of War trailer for PS5, causing a stir in the gaming community. Xbox has since addressed the mishap.

item.title: iOS 27 Introduces Exciting New Features
item.description: Apple's iOS 27 brings features like shared phone numbers and independent alarm volumes. The update enhances user experience across devices.

item.title: Apple Watch Series 9 Supports watchOS 27
item.description: Apple confirms that watchOS 27 will run on the Apple Watch Series 9, despite dropping support for older models. This ensures continued compatibility for newer users.

item.title: macOS 27 Requires Apple Silicon Only
item.description: Apple's macOS 27 will exclusively support Apple Silicon, marking the end of Intel Mac compatibility. This shift emphasizes Apple's transition to its own chips.

item.title: Summer Game Fest 2026 Highlights Major Reveals
item.description: The Summer Game Fest showcased major game trailers, including a new Spyro and Final Fantasy 7 remake updates. Fans are buzzing about the announcements.

item.title: Apple Enhances Parental Controls for iPhones
item.description: Apple introduces new screen time features, giving parents more control over their children's iPhone usage. This aims to improve digital parenting tools.
